title: Blockified
description: Tools, Blocks, Easy Recipes and More!
body:
# Blockified!
This is a mod I created for my own enjoyment, because, why not? Also thought of releasing it so here it is! 


## This Mod will be getting a COMPLETE OVERHAUL!!
I've decided myself I would not use MCreator anymore. I actually want to remake this from scratch using IntelliJ using the provided files I already have. 

### What's to come?
- There will be more blocks and weapons, each with their own unique recipe
- maybe a new dimension
- mobs(?)

and many more to come...perhaps you can suggest some ideas!

---

### What's already added
There's Tar Blocks, Tar Ingot, and Hot Tar that deals damage, and Bog Blocks! And Ice Blocks that are resistant to explosions! 

### Cheaper recipes for expensive items 
- Anvil uses smooth stone! 
- You can craft leash/leads
- Turn any wool back into string

and new recipes for existing minecraft blocks and items!!

and a sword called The Sword of Experience, along with its' axe counterpart!
